sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Find the very first frame of level 2 (the initial state)
# Check transitions for level boundaries
for i, t in enumerate(transitions):
    if t.after_frame.level == 2 and (i == 0 or t.before_frame.level != 2):
        seg = t.before_frame.segmentation if t.before_frame.level == 2 else t.after_frame.segmentation
        # Actually let's just look at the first level 2 frame
        first_l2_frame = t.after_frame
        seg = first_l2_frame.segmentation
        nodes = seg['nodes']
        print(f"First L2 frame at step {first_l2_frame.step}")
        # List all non-background nodes
        for n in nodes:
            if n['pixels'] >= 4:
                print(f"  id={n['id']} color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} boundary={n['boundary']} children={n['children']}")
        break
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
